overview.Name: ZKH Group Limited
overview.Description: ZKH Group Limited is a diversified investment holding company that strategically operates in the technology, finance, and real estate sectors. With a strong emphasis on innovation and sustainability, the firm leverages its extensive expertise and partnerships to identify and seize growth opportunities, particularly in emerging markets. ZKH Group is committed to delivering long-term value to its investors while ensuring robust corporate governance and positive community impact. Its adaptable business model allows the company to effectively respond to evolving market dynamics, positioning it to maximize shareholder returns.
